Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ryan donlon, esq., 303.623.4500, for plaintiff pacific bell telephone co dba at&t california.
akop baltayan, esq., 626.372.0399, for defendant connectto communications inc.

RULING: no argument. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF PACIFIC BELL TELEPHONE CO.'s Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery And For Sanctions is Granted. No opposition filed. Monetary sanctions of $ 2,000.00 are awarded in favor of Pacific Bell Telephone Company and against Defendant's counsel Akop Baltayan only to be paid within 30 days. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-10-2013 Continued To Jul-19-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ryan C. Donlon, Esq. of Franke Greenhouse LLP, Tel. 303.623.4500, for plaintiff and moving party via Court Call;
Akop Baltayan, Esq. of the Law Offices of Akop Baltayan, Tel. 626.372.0399, for defendant and opposing party via Court Call.

RULING: Counsel for defendant did not stipulate for the judge pro tem hear this matter. The matter was argued. PLAINTIFF PACIFIC BELL TELEPHONE CO.'s Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery And For Sanctions is continued to July 19, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. Judge Pro Tem: James Watson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
